origin.bindingWording: After migration, prove the healthy baseline again, then perform one bounded Redis stop/restore.
origin.technicalPremise: a region migration or normalization was assumed necessary before the outage
origin.technicalPremiseEvidence: not found in current Railway documentation or repository runbooks

repositoryEvidence.finding: Treats us-east4-eqdc4a as the intended production-shaped region.
Defines direct stop and restore gates without a region prerequisite.
Defines direct isolated-preview stop/recovery proof without a region prerequisite.
Requires stop and restore of the same preview Redis service and volume without a region prerequisite.

decision: The later prerequisite was correctly obeyed while it was binding, but its technical premise is stale and should be removed from the next outage authorization.
